description: UC5 (chronic-disease lab cadence) — alt phrasing probe. Patient 90005 has T2DM with last A1c on 2024-08-15 (~21 months stale at as_of=2026-05-02). The query is phrased as a date question rather than an overdue question; the agent should still cite the actual lab record and not fabricate a more recent value.
query: When was this patient's last A1c?
